part.partDescription: Gringo SV Helmet - Gloss Mint Julip - XL
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is lightweight and highly resistant to impacts
part.bullet2: Evolutionary Gringo S shell styling features front, side, and rear vent ports to improve interior airflow, moisture dissipation, and cooling
part.bullet3: Dual Density expanded polystyrene (EPS) internal safety shell absorbs and dissipates impact energy without compromising comfort
part.bullet4: Adjustable vents above the eye port let you regulate internal airflow to cool and dry your head
part.bullet5: Molded urethane chin bar pad dissipates energy during front impact
part.bullet6: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touchpoints for comfort, and a D-ring retention system with red quick-release pull tab for speedy removal
part.bullet7: CE-certified, injection-molded polycarbonate shield features anti-fog and anti-scratch treatments for durability and safety
part.bullet8: Rugged hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to ride with the shield open at slow speeds to increase cooling airflow
part.bullet9: Anodized aluminum washers and stainless-steel hinge screws can be swapped with different colors and finishes to personalize the look of your helmet (hinge hardware sets available separately)
part.bullet10: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads are constructed with fleece Lycra and open-cell foam padding to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet11: The BioFoam head form panel and ventilated polyester padding maximize airflow around your head to ensure coolness and comfort
part.bullet12: Molded EPS ear pockets fit select aftermarket audio accessories

part.partDescription: Gringo S Helmet - Flames - Gloss Garnet Red - Small
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is rugged yet lightweight
part.bullet2: Expanded Polystyrene (EPS) liner dissipates impact loads and fortifies helmet structure for a secure fit without compromising comfort
part.bullet3: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads feature brushed fleece Lycra touch points to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet4: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touch points for comfort and an adjustable strap end retainer
part.bullet5: Rugged shield hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to open the shield at slow speeds for increased airflow
part.bullet6: Molded recesses inside EPS designed to accept various aftermarket audio and communication components

part.bullet3: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads feature brushed fleece Lycra touch points to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet4: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touch points for comfort and an adjustable strap end retainer
part.bullet5: Molded recesses inside EPS interior shell accept select aftermarket audio and communication components
part.bullet6: Rugged shield hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to open the shield at slow speeds for increased airflow

part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS plastic outer shell with hand-painted finish
part.bullet2: Expanded polystyrene inner shell
part.bullet3: Hand-sewn, removable, brushed Lycra® liner with contrasting diamond-stitched quilted open-cell foam padding
part.bullet4: Internal BioFoam chin pad with hand-sewn contrast stitching
part.bullet5: Rugged, plated steel D-ring neck strap with adjustment strap end retainer

part.partDescription: Gringo S Helmet - Flat Red - XS
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell with hand-painted finish
part.bullet2: Expanded polystyrene inner shell
part.bullet3: Hand-sewn, removable, brushed Lycra® liner with contrasting diamond-stitched quilted open-cell foam padding
part.bullet4: Internal BioFoam chin pad with hand-sewn contrast stitching
part.bullet5: Rugged, plated steel D-ring neck strap with adjustment strap end retainer
part.bullet6: Injection-molded, laser CNC cut polycarbonate eye port shield with stylish, rugged aluminum hinge covers and mounting hardware

part.partDescription: Lane Splitter Helmet - Flat Titanium - XS
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is rugged yet lightweight
part.bullet2: Three-piece Expanded Polystyrene (EPS) safety liner dissipates impact loads and fortifies helmet structure for a secure fit without compromising comfort
part.bullet3: Molded urethane chin bar pad features front and side vents for airflow
part.bullet4: CE-certified polycarbonate shield includes anti-fog and anti-scratch treatments for safety and durability
part.bullet5: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads feature brushed fleece Lycra touch points to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet6: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touch points for comfort and an adjustable strap end retainer
part.bullet7: Molded recesses inside EPS interior shell accept select aftermarket audio and communication components
part.bullet8: Rugged shield hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to open the shield at slow speeds for increased airflow

part.partDescription: Lane Splitter Helmet - Gloss Blood Red - XS
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is rugged yet lightweight
part.bullet2: Three-piece Expanded Polystyrene (EPS) safety liner dissipates impact loads and fortifies helmet structure for a secure fit without compromising comfort
part.bullet3: Molded urethane chin bar pad features front and side vents for airflow
part.bullet4: CE-certified polycarbonate shield includes anti-fog and anti-scratch treatments for safety and durability
part.bullet5: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads feature brushed fleece Lycra touch points to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet6: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touch points for comfort and an adjustable strap end retainer
part.bullet7: Molded recesses inside EPS interior shell accept select aftermarket audio and communication components
part.bullet8: Rugged shield hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to open the shield at slow speeds for increased airflow

part.partDescription: Gringo SV Helmet - Gloss Black - XS
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is lightweight and highly resistant to impacts
part.bullet2: Evolutionary Gringo S shell styling features front, side, and rear vent ports to improve interior airflow, moisture dissipation, and cooling
part.bullet3: Dual Density expanded polystyrene (EPS) internal safety shell absorbs and dissipates impact energy without compromising comfort
part.bullet4: Adjustable vents above the eye port let you regulate internal airflow to cool and dry your head
part.bullet5: Molded urethane chin bar pad dissipates energy during front impact
part.bullet6: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touchpoints for comfort, and a D-ring retention system with red quick-release pull tab for speedy removal
part.bullet7: Injection-molded polycarbonate shield features anti-fog and anti-scratch treatments for durability and safety
part.bullet8: Rugged hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to ride with the shield open at slow speeds to increase cooling airflow
part.bullet9: Anodized aluminum washers and stainless-steel hinge screws can be swapped with different colors and finishes to personalize the look of your helmet (hinge hardware sets available separately)
part.bullet10: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads are constructed with fleece Lycra and open-cell foam padding to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet11: The BioFoam head form panel and ventilated polyester padding maximize airflow around your head to ensure coolness and comfort
part.bullet12: Molded EPS ear pockets fit select aftermarket audio accessories

part.partDescription: Gringo SV Helmet - Metallic Seafoam - XS
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is lightweight and highly resistant to impacts
part.bullet2: Evolutionary Gringo S shell styling features front, side, and rear vent ports to improve interior airflow, moisture dissipation, and cooling
part.bullet3: Dual Density expanded polystyrene (EPS) internal safety shell absorbs and dissipates impact energy without compromising comfort
part.bullet4: Adjustable vents above the eye port let you regulate internal airflow to cool and dry your head
part.bullet5: Molded urethane chin bar pad dissipates energy during front impact
part.bullet6: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touchpoints for comfort, and a D-ring retention system with red quick-release pull tab for speedy removal
part.bullet7: Injection-molded polycarbonate shield features anti-fog and anti-scratch treatments for durability and safety
part.bullet8: Rugged hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to ride with the shield open at slow speeds to increase cooling airflow
part.bullet9: Anodized aluminum washers and stainless-steel hinge screws can be swapped with different colors and finishes to personalize the look of your helmet (hinge hardware sets available separately)
part.bullet10: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads are constructed with fleece Lycra and open-cell foam padding to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet11: The BioFoam head form panel and ventilated polyester padding maximize airflow around your head to ensure coolness and comfort
part.bullet12: Molded EPS ear pockets fit select aftermarket audio accessories

part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is rugged yet lightweight
part.bullet2: Expanded Polystyrene (EPS) liner dissipates impact loads and fortifies helmet structure for a secure fit without compromising comfort
part.bullet3: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads feature rushed fleece Lycra touch points to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet4: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touch points for comfort and an adjustable strap end retainer
part.bullet5: Molded recesses inside EPS designed to accept various aftermarket audio and communication compontents

part.partDescription: Gringo S Helmet - Flat Titanium - XS
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell with hand-painted finish
part.bullet2: Expanded polystyrene inner shell
part.bullet3: Hand-sewn, removable, brushed Lycra® liner with contrasting diamond-stitched quilted open-cell foam padding
part.bullet4: Internal BioFoam chin pad with hand-sewn contrast stitching
part.bullet5: Rugged, plated steel D-ring neck strap with adjustment strap end retainer
part.bullet6: Injection-molded, laser CNC cut polycarbonate eye port shield with stylish, rugged aluminum hinge covers and mounting hardware

part.partDescription: Gringo S Helmet - Gloss Storm Gray - XS

part.bullet2: Expanded polystyrene inner shell
part.bullet3: Hand-sewn, removable, brushed Lycra® liner with contrasting diamond-stitched quilted open-cell foam padding
part.bullet4: Internal BioFoam chin pad with hand-sewn contrast stitching
part.bullet5: Rugged, plated steel D-ring neck strap with adjustment strap end retainer
part.bullet6: Injection-molded, laser CNC cut polycarbonate eye port shield with stylish, rugged aluminum hinge covers and mounting hardware

part.bullet2: Expanded polystyrene inner shell

part.partDescription: Gringo SV Helmet - Gloss Black - Large
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is lightweight and highly resistant to impacts
part.bullet2: Evolutionary Gringo S shell styling features front, side, and rear vent ports to improve interior airflow, moisture dissipation, and cooling
part.bullet3: Dual Density expanded polystyrene (EPS) internal safety shell absorbs and dissipates impact energy without compromising comfort
part.bullet4: Adjustable vents above the eye port let you regulate internal airflow to cool and dry your head
part.bullet5: Molded urethane chin bar pad dissipates energy during front impact
part.bullet6: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touchpoints for comfort, and a D-ring retention system with red quick-release pull tab for speedy removal
part.bullet7: Injection-molded polycarbonate shield features anti-fog and anti-scratch treatments for durability and safety
part.bullet8: Rugged hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to ride with the shield open at slow speeds to increase cooling airflow
part.bullet9: Anodized aluminum washers and stainless-steel hinge screws can be swapped with different colors and finishes to personalize the look of your helmet (hinge hardware sets available separately)
part.bullet10: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads are constructed with fleece Lycra and open-cell foam padding to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet11: The BioFoam head form panel and ventilated polyester padding maximize airflow around your head to ensure coolness and comfort
part.bullet12: Molded EPS ear pockets fit select aftermarket audio accessories

part.bullet1: Technically manufactured with a forged and CNC lathe-turned 6061-T6 aluminum tubing
part.bullet2: Grips comprised of Thermoplastic Velcanizate (TPZ) rubber sleeve and installed over the tube's knurled surface for traction and comfort
part.bullet3: Internal gear interface inside the AlumiCore grip for TBW is forged into the grip's aluminum sleeve, so it will never break or disengage from the TBW module's gear interface

part.bullet4: If grip sets aren't installed, bars will be 1-1/8" shorter than listed
part.bullet5: These bars will not mount to normal 1” clamps found on the majority of stock and aftermarket risers

part.partDescription: Chin Spoiler - Gringo / Gringo S / Gringo SV - 22.06
part.bullet1: Replacement chin spoiler for Biltwell Gringo, Gringo S, and Gringo SV helmets
part.bullet2: Slips right into your helmet's chin bar creating a loose seal that keeps air from rushing in

part.partDescription: 1" Handlebar w/ TBW Plugs - Ape Hanger - Chrome
part.bullet1: Injection-molded, reinforced nylon plug in the bar end on the throttle side lets the handlebar work with select stock and aftermarket single- and dual-cable throttles; simply remove for TBW compatibility
part.bullet2: Seamless, thick-walled 0.120" (3 mm) 4130 chromoly construction
part.bullet3: Precision mandrel-bent tubing for precise alignment and comfortable ergonomics
part.bullet4: Milled slots on bar ends and clamping area for clean internal wire routing
part.bullet5: Notched and internally tapered right-side bar end accepts Harley Throttle-By-Wire control module
part.bullet6: Precision mitered, TIG welded tube joints

part.bullet1: 1" OD x .120" (3 mm) wall with seamless 4130 chromoly tubing
part.bullet2: All bends are created with internal mandrels on a CNC bender to reduce flat spots in the bends
part.bullet3: All welded joints are precision-mitered and TIG-welded
part.bullet4: For aftermarket/custom applications
part.bullet5: Not notched for TBW applications.

part.bullet1: Investment-cast one-piece steel bar clamp accepts 1-1/8" O.D. handlebars
part.bullet2: 0.120" (3 mm) wall x 1" O.D. 4130 chromoly uprights
part.bullet3: CNC lathe-turned mounting bases accept 1/2-13 t.p.i. stock and aftermarket mounting hardware
part.bullet4: Mounting holes on 3.5" centers to fit most stock and select aftermarket H-D fork trees
part.bullet5: Pullback Murdock risers feature mandrel-bent uprights for two inches of rearward bar offset—perfect for reducing reach for shorter riders
part.bullet6: TIG welded and hand polished before polishing
part.bullet7: Stainless-steel 5/16-18 t.p.i. bar clamp hardware

part.bullet1: Injection-molded scratch- and impact-resistant polycarbonate thermoplastic construction
part.bullet2: Colored shields feature in-mold tint technology
part.bullet3: Mirrored shields feature reflective coating in a variety of surface finishes to reduce glare
part.bullet4: Every shield color and style provides 91% UV/A and 99% AV/B light resistance based on AATCC-138 test standard
part.bullet5: Anti-fog treatment on shield interior fights moisture build-up from breathing and humidity
part.bullet6: Shield UV rated at UV +50 with over 92% UVA block and over 99% UVB block

part.partDescription: Gringo S Shield - Gen 2 - Flat - Yellow
part.productName: Gringo S Helmet Gen 2 Flat Shield
part.bullet1: Fits all Gringo S models
part.bullet2: Injection-molded scratch- and impact-resistant polycarbonate thermoplastic construction
part.bullet3: Baseplates have improved mechanism that results in firmer detents for three open positions
part.bullet4: Nickel-plated stainless-steel snap on shield fastens securely to snap on helmet shell
part.bullet5: Anti-fog treatment on shield interior fights moisture build-up from breathing and humidity for maximum optical clarity

part.partDescription: Gringo S Helmet - Flames - Gloss Garnet Red - XS
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is rugged yet lightweight
part.bullet2: Expanded Polystyrene (EPS) liner dissipates impact loads and fortifies helmet structure for a secure fit without compromising comfort
part.bullet3: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads feature brushed fleece Lycra touch points to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet4: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touch points for comfort and an adjustable strap end retainer
part.bullet5: Rugged shield hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to open the shield at slow speeds for increased airflow
part.bullet6: Molded recesses inside EPS designed to accept various aftermarket audio and communication components

part.partDescription: Gringo S Helmet - Flames - Gloss Garnet Red - XL
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is rugged yet lightweight
part.bullet2: Expanded Polystyrene (EPS) liner dissipates impact loads and fortifies helmet structure for a secure fit without compromising comfort
part.bullet3: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads feature brushed fleece Lycra touch points to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet4: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touch points for comfort and an adjustable strap end retainer
part.bullet5: Rugged shield hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to open the shield at slow speeds for increased airflow
part.bullet6: Molded recesses inside EPS designed to accept various aftermarket audio and communication components

part.partDescription: Gringo S Helmet - Tracker - Gloss Storm Gray/Black - XS
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is lightweight and resistant to impacts
part.bullet2: Dual Density expanded polystyrene (EPS) internal safety shell absorbs and dissipates impact energy without compromising comfort
part.bullet3: Molded urethane chin bar pad dissipates energy during front impact
part.bullet4: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touchpoints for comfort, and a D-ring retention system with red quick-release pull tab for speedy removal
part.bullet5: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads are constructed with fleece Lycra and open-cell foam padding to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet6: BioFoam head form panel and ventilated polyester padding maximize airflow around your head to ensure coolness and comfort
part.bullet7: Molded EPS ear pockets fit select aftermarket audio accessories

part.partDescription: Gringo SV Helmet - Gloss Intersection Warm - XS
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is lightweight and highly resistant to impacts
part.bullet2: Evolutionary Gringo S shell styling features front, side, and rear vent ports to improve interior airflow, moisture dissipation, and cooling
part.bullet3: Dual Density expanded polystyrene (EPS) internal safety shell absorbs and dissipates impact energy without compromising comfort
part.bullet4: Adjustable vents above the eye port let you regulate internal airflow to cool and dry your head
part.bullet5: Molded urethane chin bar pad dissipates energy during front impact
part.bullet6: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touchpoints for comfort, and a D-ring retention system with red quick-release pull tab for speedy removal
part.bullet7: CE-certified, injection-molded polycarbonate shield features anti-fog and anti-scratch treatments for durability and safety
part.bullet8: Rugged hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to ride with the shield open at slow speeds to increase cooling airflow
part.bullet9: Anodized aluminum washers and stainless-steel hinge screws can be swapped with different colors and finishes to personalize the look of your helmet (hinge hardware sets available separately)
part.bullet10: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads are constructed with fleece Lycra and open-cell foam padding to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet11: The BioFoam head form panel and ventilated polyester padding maximize airflow around your head to ensure coolness and comfort
part.bullet12: Molded EPS ear pockets fit select aftermarket audio accessories

part.bullet12: Molded EPS ear pockets fit select aftermarket audio accessories

part.partDescription: Gringo S Helmet - Gloss Agave Blue - XS
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is rugged yet lightweight
part.bullet2: Expanded Polystyrene (EPS) liner dissipates impact loads and fortifies helmet structure for a secure fit without compromising comfort
part.bullet3: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads feature brushed fleece Lycra touch points to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet4: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touch points for comfort and an adjustable strap end retainer
part.bullet5: Rugged shield hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to open the shield at slow speeds for increased airflow
part.bullet6: Molded recesses inside EPS designed to accept various aftermarket audio and communication components

part.bullet1: Replacement chin spoiler for Biltwell Lane Splitter helmets
part.bullet2: This replacement part is a simple element that reduces wind noise and airflow inside the helmet by redirecting the wind that normally rushes into the helmet from under the chin bar.

part.partDescription: Gringo S Shield - Gen 2 - Pinlock® ProtecTINT™ - Transition
part.productName: Gringo S Pinlock® ProtecTINT™ Included Shield
part.bullet1: Combines rugged materials and advanced optic technologies to improve vision in a wide-range of riding conditions
part.bullet2: Sun-reactive ProtecTINT™ technology adjusts from clear to light smoke for perfect vision in all conditions
part.bullet3: Pinlock® lens features Dry Hydrophilic moisture absorbing technology for fog-free vision
part.bullet4: Biltwell Gen 2 hinge hardware included for fast, easy installation
part.bullet5: Pinlock® lens is pre-installed on highly scratch- and impact-resistant molded polycarbonate Lane Splitter shield
part.bullet6: In sunshine, Pinlock® ProtecTINT™ lens changes to light smoke in seconds to dramatically reduce glare and returns to clear in nighttime and low-light situations
part.bullet7: Do not use household cleaners or petroleum-based chemicals to clean any part of the Lane Splitter shield or the Pinlock® lens. Doing so will destroy the anti-fog and photochromic properties of the sun reactive lens assembly. Mild soapy water and a lint-free microfiber towel is sufficient to clean the inside and outside surfaces of the shield/protecTINT™ lens assembly.
part.bullet8: Will not work with the ECE R22.06 Gringo S and Gringo SV helmets because the closure has been updated on those helmets.

part.partDescription: Lane Splitter Shield - Gen 2 - Pinlock® ProtecTINT™- Transition
part.productName: Lane Splitter Helmet Pinlock® ProtecTINT Shield
part.bullet1: Combines rugged materials and advanced optic technologies to improve vision in a wide-range of riding conditions
part.bullet2: Pinlock® lens features Dry Hydrophilic moisture absorbing technology for fog-free vision
part.bullet3: Sun-reactive ProtecTINT™ technology adjusts from clear to light smoke for perfect vision in all conditions
part.bullet4: Biltwell Gen 2 hinge hardware included for fast, easy installation
part.bullet5: Pinlock® lens is pre-installed on highly scratch- and impact-resistant molded polycarbonate Lane Splitter shield
part.bullet6: In sunshine, Pinlock®'s ProtecTINT™ lens changes to light smoke in seconds to dramatically reduce glare and returns to clear in nighttime and low-light situations
part.bullet7: Do not use household cleaners or petroleum-based chemicals to clean any part of the Lane Splitter shield or the Pinlock® lens. Doing so will destroy the anti-fog and photochromic properties of the sun reactive lens assembly. Mild soapy water and a lint-free microfiber towel is sufficient to clean the inside and outside surfaces of the shield/protecTINT™ lens assembly.

part.partDescription: Gringo S/Gringo SV Shield - 22.06 - Pinlock® ProtecTINT™ Included - Clear
part.productName: Gringo S/Gringo SV Helmet Pinlock® ProtecTINT™ Included Shield
part.bullet1: Combines rugged materials and advanced optic technologies to improve vision in a wide range of riding conditions
part.bullet2: In sunshine, Pinlock® ProtecTINT™ lens changes to light smoke in seconds to dramatically reduce glare
part.bullet3: Pinlock® ProtecTINT™ included lens returns to clear in nighttime and low-light situations
part.bullet4: In wet weather and high humidity, Pinlock®'s Dry Hydrophilic lens technology absorbs and holds moisture so you can see virtually fog-free
part.bullet5: Lens pre-installed on scratch and impact resistant molded polycarbonate Gringo S/Gringo SV shield
part.bullet6: Biltwell Gen 2 hinge hardware included for fast, easy installation
part.bullet7: Will not work with the old ECE R22.05 Gringo S helmets because the closure has been updated.

part.bullet1: Adjustable foot pegs constructed with CNC-machined billet 6061 T-6 aluminum
part.bullet2: Investment-cast 4130 chromoly clevises with 5/16-18 t.p.i. Allen cap mounting hardware
part.bullet3: Replaceable stainless-steel pins and ball-milled body surfacing for traction on boots and sneakers

part.partDescription: Male Mount Replacement Clevis - Black - Passenger
part.bullet1: Constructed of investment-cast 4130 chromoly steel for strength
part.bullet2: Feature a threaded interface to make adjusting the angle of foot pegs easy
part.bullet3: Conical surface creates a tension fit inside the foot peg when the 5/16-18 Allen cap screw is tightened inside the clevis, which holds the peg in place
part.bullet4: The clevises fasten to the 2-pronged mount with the stock pivot pin assembly, or you can use 3/8-inch bolts and nuts to secure the complete peg assembly to your machine

part.bullet3: Wrist cuff features suede pull with embroidered logo detailing
part.bullet4: Quilted expansion panels on index and middle finger joints for added dexterity
part.bullet5: Innovative palm, thumb and finger construction puts seams on the outside - less chafing and more comfort
part.bullet6: Raised welt detailing on back of hand
part.bullet7: Elasticated wrist closure on full wraparound cuffs

part.bullet1: Sleek, injection-molded plastic frame with slightly wider peripheral space to accept many prescription glasses
part.bullet2: Impact-resistant clear polycarbonate lens features anti-fog coating for foul weather riding
part.bullet3: Double D-rings on the woven elastic strap provide precise adjustment to fit a wide range of helmet shell sizes
part.bullet4: Silicone strips on the back of the strap create stiction against the helmet to reduce slipping
part.bullet5: Two-stage face foam with brushed fleece outer layer wicks moisture away from skin and provides filtration to keep goggle interior clean and dust free

part.bullet1: Investment-cast stainless steel construction
part.bullet2: Each peg attaches with a single Allen cap screw to an infinitely adjustable cast chromoly male clevis
part.bullet3: Riders can easily fine-tune the angle of the textured surface relative to the bottom of their boots
part.bullet4: Pegs measure 1-1/8" wide by 4" long

part.bullet6: Internal high-impact plastic padded knuckle guards
part.bullet7: Wide elastic velcro wrist closure with thermoplastic rubber Biltwell pull tab
part.bullet8: Smart screen-compatible thumb and finger tips

part.bullet1: Synthetic suede palm features two-way stretch for a snug, comfortable fit
part.bullet2: Three-ply, one-piece vented polyester back and thumb construction for maximum airflow
part.bullet3: Flexible thermoplastic rubber knuckle guards and shield logo
part.bullet4: Lycra® expansion panels in finger joints for dexterity
part.bullet5: Rugged Single- and double-needle polyester stitching
part.bullet6: Thermoplastic rubber knuckle guards on the back of the glove provide protection from rocky roost and airborne road debris
part.bullet7: A double-stitched reinforcement panel on the thumb and index finger adds strength to the friction zone between your hands and the grips
part.bullet8: Conductive stitching in fingers and thumb lets you operate smart screens

part.bullet2: Suede friction zones with strategic padding for impact protection

part.bullet4: Perforated palm panels increase durability without compromising flex
part.bullet5: Internal padded high-impact plastic knuckle guards
part.bullet6: Wide elastic Velcro wrist closure with thermoplastic rubber Biltwell pull tab
part.bullet7: Smart screen-compatible thumb and fingertips

part.partDescription: HI Test Flannel Shirt - Black - Large
part.bullet1: Super comfortable 6.5 oz. 100% heavyweight cotton
part.bullet2: Plated stainless-steel snaps on placket, cuffs, collar, and pocket flaps
part.bullet3: Plaid colorways features black pearl snap detailing for a high-end finish
part.bullet4: Hidden snaps on collar tips eliminate flapping at high speeds
part.bullet5: Elastic thumb loops keep sleeve cuffs pulled down over wrists
part.bullet6: Discrete slot on chest pocket flap makes storing glasses fast and easy
part.bullet7: Polyester single-needle, double-needle, and overlock stitching throughout
part.bullet8: High-quality embroidered interior tags and exterior brand detailing
part.bullet9: Machine wash in cold water; do not bleach.
part.bullet10: Do not dry clean, iron.

part.bullet1: 100% cowhide construction on exterior for durability and abrasion resistance

part.bullet5: Perforated palm panels for flex and added durability
part.bullet6: Internal high-impact plastic padded knuckle guards
part.bullet7: Wide elastic velcro wrist closure with thermoplastic rubber Biltwell pull tab
part.bullet8: Smart screen-compatible thumb and finger tips

part.bullet1: Super-tough 13 oz. 100% cotton canvas exterior
part.bullet2: Breathable 57% polyester/43% Repreve recycled interior liner with sublimated graphic
part.bullet3: Woven stretch polyester collar with Spandex to hold shape
part.bullet4: 3” wide canvas accordion side panels with stretch Nylon/Elastane construction
part.bullet5: Heavy-duty Vison two-way weatherproof zipper with high-traction Hypalon pulls
part.bullet6: Two lower front pockets with double-needle stitching and riveted corner reinforcements
part.bullet7: Oversized hidden pocket on right chest with 8-inch vertical zipper
part.bullet8: Single patch pocket on left chest
part.bullet9: Two interior patch pockets, one with internal elastic loop for key fob storage
part.bullet10: Polyester single-needle, double-needle, and overlock stitched seams throughout
part.bullet11: High-quality embroidered interior tags and exterior brand detailing
part.bullet12: Care instructions: Machine wash in cold water. Do not machine dry, bleach, iron, or dry clean this garment.

part.bullet1: Goatskin gloves with suede cow leather palm panels for improved grip and abrasion resistance

part.bullet1: Design inspired by the 1980’s Golden Age of motocross

part.bullet4: Stretch polyester construction on ring and pinkie fingers for maximum flexibility

part.bullet8: Rugged single- and double-needle polyester stitching throughout
part.bullet9: Thermoplastic rubber lightning bolt knuckle protector
part.bullet10: 5mm thick hidden neoprene knuckle guard
part.bullet11: Conductive stitching in fingers and thumb lets you operate smart screen

part.bullet1: Abrasion-resistant 7.5 oz. 76% Cotton / 24% Nylon twill construction
part.bullet2: 100% Polyester fleece body lining provides warmth without overheating
part.bullet3: Smooth 57% Polyester / 43% Repreve lining on sleeves
part.bullet4: Provides great resistance to wind and mild weather without compromising fit or flexibility
part.bullet5: Sleeves are lined with silky smooth repreve recycled polyester
part.bullet6: Heavy-duty nickel-plated ring snaps on placket, cuffs, collar, and pocket flaps
part.bullet7: Hidden snaps on collar tips eliminate flapping at high speeds
part.bullet8: Elastic thumb loops keep sleeve cuffs pulled down over wrists
part.bullet9: Rugged interior pocket features an elastic loop for key fob storage
part.bullet10: Polyester single-needle, double-needle, and overlock stitched seams throughout
part.bullet11: Two exterior pockets with snap flaps on chest
part.bullet12: Two lined hand pockets hidden on outer seams
part.bullet13: High-quality embroidered interior tags and exterior brand detailing
part.bullet14: Five pockets provide options for carrying gloves, key fobs, glasses, cash, and other essentials
part.bullet16: Do not machine dry, dry clean, iron.

part.partDescription: Moto 2.0 Goggle - Script - Black - Clear Lens
part.bullet1: Sleek, injection-molded plastic frame with slightly wider peripheral space to accept many prescription glasses
part.bullet2: Impact-resistant clear polycarbonate lens features anti-fog coating for foul weather riding
part.bullet3: Double D-rings on the woven elastic strap provide precise adjustment to fit a wide range of helmet shell sizes
part.bullet4: Silicone strips on the back of the strap create stiction against the helmet to reduce slipping
part.bullet5: Two-stage face foam with brushed fleece outer layer wicks moisture away from skin and provides filtration to keep goggle interior clean and dust free

part.bullet1: Injection-molded frame features wide-periphery eye port for enhanced side visibility
part.bullet2: Woven elastic strap with double D-rings allows more precise size and tension adjustment
part.bullet3: Optically precise, injection-molded polycarbonate lenses feature anti-fog treatment and European CE-certified UV A/B protection for clearer vision
part.bullet4: Silicone strips on goggle strap eliminate slipping on slick helmet shell surfaces
part.bullet5: Two-stage, open-cell foam eye port padding features quilted, brushed Lycra surface detailing for moisture wicking and comfort
part.bullet6: Stitched synthetic leather strap hinge panels add surface tension to eyeport for a more secure fit
part.bullet7: Additional clear lens included for all condition riding

part.partDescription: HI Test Flannel Shirt - Moss - Medium
part.bullet1: Super comfortable 6.5 oz. 100% heavyweight cotton
part.bullet2: Plated stainless-steel snaps on placket, cuffs, collar, and pocket flaps
part.bullet3: Plaid colorways features black pearl snap detailing for a high-end finish
part.bullet4: Hidden snaps on collar tips eliminate flapping at high speeds
part.bullet5: Elastic thumb loops keep sleeve cuffs pulled down over wrists
part.bullet6: Discrete slot on chest pocket flap makes storing glasses fast and easy
part.bullet7: Polyester single-needle, double-needle, and overlock stitching throughout
part.bullet8: High-quality embroidered interior tags and exterior brand detailing
part.bullet9: Machine wash in cold water; do not bleach.
part.bullet10: Do not dry clean, iron.

part.bullet11: Hidden cable port into main compartment—perfect for charging devices

part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is lightweight and highly resistant to impacts
part.bullet2: Evolutionary Gringo S shell styling features front, side, and rear vent ports to improve interior airflow, moisture dissipation, and cooling

part.bullet6: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touchpoints for comfort, and a D-ring retention system with red quick-release pull tab for speedy removal
part.bullet7: Injection-molded polycarbonate shield features anti-fog and anti-scratch treatments for durability and safety
part.bullet8: Rugged hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to ride with the shield open at slow speeds to increase cooling airflow
part.bullet9: Anodized aluminum washers and stainless-steel hinge screws can be swapped with different colors and finishes to personalize the look of your helmet (hinge hardware sets available separately)
part.bullet10: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads are constructed with fleece Lycra and open-cell foam padding to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet11: The BioFoam head form panel and ventilated polyester padding maximize airflow around your head to ensure coolness and comfort
part.bullet12: Molded EPS ear pockets fit select aftermarket audio accessories

part.partDescription: Gringo SV Helmet - Metallic Sierra Green - XS
part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is lightweight and highly resistant to impacts
part.bullet2: Evolutionary Gringo S shell styling features front, side, and rear vent ports to improve interior airflow, moisture dissipation, and cooling
part.bullet3: Dual Density expanded polystyrene (EPS) internal safety shell absorbs and dissipates impact energy without compromising comfort
part.bullet4: Adjustable vents above the eye port let you regulate internal airflow to cool and dry your head
part.bullet5: Molded urethane chin bar pad dissipates energy during front impact
part.bullet6: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touchpoints for comfort, and a D-ring retention system with red quick-release pull tab for speedy removal
part.bullet7: Injection-molded polycarbonate shield features anti-fog and anti-scratch treatments for durability and safety
part.bullet8: Rugged hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to ride with the shield open at slow speeds to increase cooling airflow
part.bullet9: Anodized aluminum washers and stainless-steel hinge screws can be swapped with different colors and finishes to personalize the look of your helmet (hinge hardware sets available separately)
part.bullet10: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads are constructed with fleece Lycra and open-cell foam padding to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet11: The BioFoam head form panel and ventilated polyester padding maximize airflow around your head to ensure coolness and comfort
part.bullet12: Molded EPS ear pockets fit select aftermarket audio accessories

part.bullet1: Injection-molded ABS outer shell is rugged yet lightweight
part.bullet2: Expanded Polystyrene (EPS) liner dissipates impact loads and fortifies helmet structure for a secure fit without compromising comfort
part.bullet3: Removable/replaceable comfort liner and cheek pads feature brushed fleece Lycra touch points to absorb and evaporate perspiration
part.bullet4: Chin strap features brushed fleece Lycra touch points for comfort and an adjustable strap end retainer
part.bullet5: Rugged shield hinge hardware with robust detents allows you to open the shield at slow speeds for increased airflow
part.bullet6: Molded recesses inside EPS designed to accept various aftermarket audio and communication components

part.bullet1: TIG welded construction throughout
part.bullet2: 5/8" O.D. (5 mm) steel rod stock for maximum strength and durability
part.bullet3: 5 mm thick laser CNC cut and hand deburred side plates
part.bullet4: CNC lathe turned mounting bungs accept supplied Allen cap hardware for easy mounting

part.bullet1: Two-way stretch polyester back panels for comfort
part.bullet2: Single layer synthetic leather palm with reinforced thumb
part.bullet3: Adjustable wrist wrap with velcro closure and thermoplastic rubber Biltwell shield
part.bullet4: Lycra expansion panels in finger joints for enhanced dexterity
part.bullet5: Accordion baffles on finger joints for added flexibility
part.bullet6: Rugged single- and double-needle polyester stitching
